method: ELO-Odds (Wunderlich & Memmert 2018), k=250, home_advantage=60, c=10, d=400
note: Elo ratings driven by de-vigged market odds instead of match results. Validated out-of-sample vs Dixon-Coles/ELO-Result/ELO-Goals on 3597 held-out matches (2017-2026): log-loss 1.0216 vs market 1.0008 (best non-market model, though not stat. significantly better than Dixon-Coles at p=0.18).
